sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Black at cols 45-53, yellow at cols 54-59
# Need 1-2 more RIGHT to overlap remaining yellow
result = action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation

print("After 2x RIGHT:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('B', 'c', 'Y') and n['pixels'] > 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = sorted([p[0] for p in b])
        cols = sorted([p[1] for p in b])
        print(f"  {n['color']}: {n['pixels']}px, rows {rows[0]}-{rows[-1]}, cols {cols[0]}-{cols[-1]}")

print("Level completed:", result.get('level_completed'))

# Check dot colors
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n--- Rows 44-54, cols 45-62 ---")
for i in range(44, 55):
    print(f"{i}: {ascii_lines[i][45:62]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
